Blueberries.hts_description: Cranberries, blueberries, and other fruits of the genus Vaccinium, fresh
Blueberries.duty_notes: Many lines duty-free under Column 1 General. Section 301 tariffs may apply depending on country of origin.

seasonal_adjustment.note: No seasonal tariff windows for blueberries. Duty rate is consistent year-round.

sps_requirements.systems_approach: May be required depending on origin country and pest risk. Confirm with USDA APHIS PPQ.

Asparagus.duty_notes: Duty rates vary by season of entry and shipment conditions. Confirm exact rate in HTSUS.

windows.notes: Peak season — higher tariff applies. Confirm current rate in HTSUS before shipment.

seasonal_adjustment.note: Duty rate changes significantly depending on date of entry. Always check entry date against seasonal windows.

sps_requirements.systems_approach: Fresh asparagus is a regulated plant product under USDA APHIS. Origin-specific conditions apply.

Grapes.duty_notes: Classification is highly seasonal. Duty rate depends on date of entry. Confirm exact subheading and rate in HTSUS before shipment.

windows.notes: Southern hemisphere harvest season — duty-free window
Northern hemisphere harvest season — also duty-free but different subheading

seasonal_adjustment.note: While currently duty-free in both windows, subheading classification still changes by season. Always confirm the correct subheading for the entry date.

sps_requirements.systems_approach: Fresh grapes may require cold treatment or Systems Approach protocols depending on origin. Verify with USDA APHIS PPQ.

Coffee_Green.duty_notes: Enters duty-free under Column 1 General. No additional tariffs typically apply.

seasonal_adjustment.note: No seasonal tariff windows for green coffee. Duty-free year-round.

sps_requirements.systems_approach: Not applicable. Green coffee is treated as a non-propagative commodity.

seasonal_adjustment.note: No seasonal tariff windows for roasted coffee. Duty-free year-round.

sps_requirements.systems_approach: Not applicable. Roasting eliminates all plant health concerns.

Quinoa.duty_notes: US General duty rate is 1.1% ad valorem. Country of origin may affect rate.

seasonal_adjustment.note: No seasonal tariff windows for quinoa. Rate is consistent year-round.

sps_requirements.systems_approach: Not applicable for food grain. Seed import rules only apply if importing for planting.

Blueberries.hs_description: Cranberries, blueberries and other fruits of the genus Vaccinium, fresh
Blueberries.duty_notes: MFN duty listed as Free under Canada Customs Tariff Chapter 8.

seasonal_adjustment.note: No seasonal tariff windows for blueberries in Canada. Free year-round under MFN.

sps_requirements.systems_approach: CFIA plant health rules apply. Exact requirements depend on origin country — confirm via AIRS.

Asparagus.duty_notes: Many asparagus lines show MFN duty as Free. Classification depends on use.

windows.notes: Domestic season — still free but classified differently

seasonal_adjustment.note: Classification subheading changes by season even though both windows are currently duty-free. Always use the correct subheading for the entry date.

sps_requirements.systems_approach: Asparagus falls under CFIA plant health requirements. Verify origin conditions via AIRS.

Grapes.duty_notes: Many grape lines show MFN duty as Free. Exact tariff line depends on product description.

seasonal_adjustment.note: Subheading classification changes by season. Confirm the correct tariff line for the shipment date.

sps_requirements.systems_approach: CFIA temperate fresh fruit framework (D-95-08) applies. Use AIRS to confirm requirements by origin.

Coffee_Green.duty_notes: Green coffee enters Canada duty-free under MFN rate.

seasonal_adjustment.note: No seasonal tariff windows for green coffee in Canada.

sps_requirements.systems_approach: Not applicable for standard green coffee.

Coffee_Roasted.duty_notes: Roasted coffee enters Canada duty-free under MFN rate.

seasonal_adjustment.note: No seasonal tariff windows for roasted coffee in Canada.

sps_requirements.systems_approach: Not applicable. Roasting eliminates plant health concerns.

Quinoa.duty_notes: Quinoa is specifically listed under HS 1008.50. MFN duty is Free.

seasonal_adjustment.note: No seasonal tariff windows for quinoa in Canada.

sps_requirements.systems_approach: Food grain quinoa — CFIA seed rules do not apply for human consumption.
